description: You are a security analyst. Research CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell), CVE-2023-4863 (libwebp), and CVE-2023-38545 (curl) on the NIST National Vulnerability Database (nvd.nist.gov). Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Vulnerability Triage' containing the official NVD detail pages for these three vulnerabilities. Generate a structured audit report at ~/Documents/cve_audit_report.json containing the 'NVD Analyzed' CVSS v3.x Base Score, exact Vector String, and Primary CWE ID for each CVE. The JSON file should use the CVE IDs as keys, with nested objects for 'cvss_score', 'vector_string', and 'cwe_id'.
